properties.name: camel.dataformat.tar-file.allow-empty-directory
properties.description: Whether to allow getting the iterator even if the directory is empty, when the tar file has more than one entry.

properties.name: camel.dataformat.tar-file.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable auto configuration of the tarFile data format. This is enabled by default.

properties.name: camel.dataformat.tar-file.max-decompressed-size
properties.description: The maximum decompressed size of a tar file (in bytes). An IOException is thrown if the decompressed size exceeds this amount. Set to -1 to disable.

properties.name: camel.dataformat.tar-file.preserve-path-elements
properties.description: Whether to preserve path elements when the file name contains path elements in the tar file.

properties.name: camel.dataformat.tar-file.using-iterator
properties.description: Whether to use an iterator to split tar entries when the tar file has more than one entry, for use with the splitter EIP in streaming mode.
